scripts.clean: npm run clean:core && npm run clean:mtproto && npm run clean:agent
scripts.clean:agent: cd agents/mtproto && rm -rf dist node_modules package-lock.json
scripts.build:core: cd packages/core && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.build:mtproto: cd plugins/mtproto && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.copy-packages: mkdir -p agents/mtproto/node_modules/@ton-ai && cp packages/core/ton-ai-core-0.1.0.tgz agents/mtproto/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null && cp plugins/mtproto/ton-ai-mtproto-0.1.0.tgz agents/mtproto/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Package copy completed'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:mtproto && npm run build:agent && npm run copy-packages
scripts.rebuild:quick: npm run build:core && npm run build:mtproto && npm run copy-packages && cd agents/mtproto && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run rebuild && npm run start:agent
